message:
fix(doctor): add --include-infra to ListAgentBeads query

ListAgentBeads() queried `bd list --label=gt:agent --json` but agent
beads are type=agent (infrastructure), which bd list hides by default.
This caused gt doctor to perpetually report missing agent beads for
rigs where agents live in the issues table rather than the wisps table
(e.g. sky crew members). Adding --include-infra makes them visible.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
